description_long: This object consists of two books, one closed and one open, both with dark blue covers and gold detailing. The closed book features a geometric gold illustration on the front cover and spine, with additional gold text. The open book reveals densely printed pages with a consistent, serif font, suggesting a technical or academic text. The covers appear to be made of a sturdy, matte material, likely cloth or heavy paperboard, while the pages are a standard off-white paper. The books are of medium thickness, indicating a substantial volume of content. The overall appearance is formal and scholarly, suitable for academic or professional environments.
description: A pair of dark blue hardcover books, one open to reveal printed pages and one closed with gold geometric detailing and text. The design is formal and academic, with sturdy covers and dense interior text.
description_view_0: The closed book is seen from the spine, with gold text and a geometric illustration visible, while the open book displays its printed pages.
description_view_1: Both books are viewed from above, showing the front cover of the closed book with gold detailing and the open book's two-page spread.
description_view_2: The open book is viewed from the bottom edge, emphasizing the printed pages, while the closed book's spine and partial cover are visible.
description_view_3: The open book is on the left, showing its pages, and the closed book is on the right, displaying the front cover's gold illustration.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a gold geometric illustration resembling a stylized bridge or mathematical structure, rendered in a clean, technical line style. No other imagery or artwork is present.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark blue with gold text oriented horizontally and a gold geometric illustration matching the front cover. The design is minimal and formal.
